fields.name: High amount threshold
fields.description: Trigger when transaction amount is greater than or equal to threshold.

fields.name: Foreign country check
fields.description: Trigger when transaction country differs from home country US.

fields.name: Card velocity check
fields.description: Trigger when there are 3 or more recent transactions in the lookback window.

fields.name: Disposable email domain
fields.description: Trigger when email domain belongs to disposable providers list.
